properties.name: Glenarm Castle
properties.description: One of Northern Ireland's oldest estates featuring a stunning walled garden, a charming tea room, and a great woodland play area for the kids.

properties.name: Ramore Head
properties.description: Dramatic coastal walks in Portrush. A fantastic spot for sea air, exploring rock pools, and watching the waves crash against the cliffs.

properties.name: Ormeau Park
properties.description: Belfast's oldest municipal park. It offers large playgrounds, eco-trails, and wide paths perfect for family cycling.

properties.name: V36 Adventure Play Area
properties.description: A massive, modern adventure park in Newtownabbey with climbing frames, zip wires, and plenty of space for active kids.

properties.name: Wallace Park
properties.description: The jewel of Lisburn! Features a fantastic playground, a duck pond, and safe, flat walking paths perfect for buggies.

properties.name: Cave Hill Country Park
properties.description: Home to Belfast Castle and an excellent playground. The hike to the top offers some of the best views in the city.

properties.name: People's Park
properties.description: A lovely park in the heart of Ballymena featuring a lake, a large playground, and well-maintained flower gardens.

properties.name: Antrim Lough Shore Park
properties.description: Situated on the banks of Lough Neagh. A beautiful spot for a dander, with a great playground and a family-friendly cafe.
